data.title: Neo co-founder suggests $461M treasury restructure to enhance governance transparency and community control amid leadership conflicts.
data.description: The proposed changes by Neo involve a reorganization of its foundation, redistribution of tokens to the community, and implementation of formal oversight. This comes as co-founders disagree on issues of governance and control within the organization.

data.title: TCL Turns Up the Color, Expanding its Groundbreaking SQD-Mini LED Lineup
data.description: Introducing the latest innovations from TCL - the QM8L and QM7L models are set to shake up the market with their enhanced color options and superior contrast. The QM8L promises to rival flagship competitors with its cutting-edge features, while the QM7L offers a high-color alternative that stands uncontested in the industry. With its unparalleled display quality, TCL continues to solidify its position as a top player in the consumer electronics market. Stay tuned for these groundbreaking products set to make waves in the industry.

data.title: Hofstra University Continues Longstanding Partnership with The LandTek Group to Transform Athletic Facilities at Bill Edwards Stadium and Shuart Stadium
data.description: In Bay Shore, New York, as of April 17, 2026, The LandTek Group, a subsidiary of TenCate, announced the completion of the latest phase of athletic facility improvements at Hofstra University. This project focused on enhancing the infrastructure of Bill Edwards Stadium and has contributed to elevating the overall quality of the athletic facilities on campus.

data.title: Crypto executives increase security measures amid rising wrench attacks. Paris Blockchain Week sees key players emphasizing personal safety due to surge in kidnapping and ransom incidents.
data.description: Prominent figures in the cryptocurrency industry gathered at Paris Blockchain Week, drawing attention to the increasing threat of personal security. Kidnapping and ransom attempts have seen a significant rise, prompting concerns among executives and professionals in the sector. This event highlighted the importance of ensuring safety amid a surge in such criminal activities targeting individuals within the crypto space.

data.title: Dream Office REIT Q1 2026 Financial Results Release Date, Webcast and Conference Call
data.description: Dream Office REIT, ticker symbol D.UN on the Toronto Stock Exchange, is set to announce its financial results for the quarter ending March 31, 2026, on May 7, 2026. The company will hold a conference call the next day, May 8, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time for senior management to discuss the results. Participants can join the call via audio at 1-800-715-9871 (toll-free) or 647-932-3411 (toll), as well as through a live webcast.

data.title: Dream Unlimited Corp. Q1 2026 Financial Results Release Date, Webcast and Conference Call
data.description: Dream Unlimited Corp. (TSX: DRM) will be announcing its financial results for the quarter ending March 31, 2026 on May 13, 2026. A conference call led by senior management to discuss these results is scheduled for May 14, 2026, at 11:00 a.m. (ET). Those interested can participate via audio at 1-800-715-9871 (toll-free) or 647-932-3411 (toll), or through a live webcast.

data.title: Dream Industrial REIT Q1 2026 Financial Results Release Date, Webcast and Conference Call
data.description: Dream Industrial REIT (TSX: DIR.UN) will announce its financial results for the quarter ending March 31, 2026 on May 5, 2026. A conference call led by senior management will take place the following day, May 6, 2026 at 11:00 a.m. (ET). To participate, individuals can join via audio at 1-800-715-9871 (toll free) or 647-932-3411 (toll), or through a live webcast.

data.title: Dogecoin Cash, Inc. (OTCQB: DOGP) Announces Development Initiative for “Dogecoin Gold” Digital Asset Framework
data.description: Dogecoin Cash has introduced a development framework for Dogecoin Gold, an upcoming blockchain platform that aims to connect digital tokens with tangible gold reserves. The platform's objective is to provide a secure link between cryptocurrency assets and physical gold, offering stability and intrinsic value to users. This initiative represents a significant step towards merging the world of digital currencies with traditional investments.
